axes.group: Metric family: profitability | income | balance_sheet | growth | asset_quality | capital | liquidity_funding | franchise | market_position | esg | macro
axes.level: bank | group (BDDK bank-type aggregate) | sector | macro
axes.availability: mandatory (regulatory disclosure) | voluntary (management/IR, bank-defined) | third_party (rating agency / TBB) | none
axes.cadence: daily | weekly | monthly | quarterly | annual | adhoc | none
axes.standard_across_banks: true if comparable like-for-like across banks; false if each bank defines it differently
axes.reproducible: direct (stored field) | derived (formula over stored fields) | partial (approx / wrong level or cadence) | no
axes.source_datasets: bank_audit | bddk_monthly | bddk_weekly | evds | tbb_digital | external | none

metrics.definition: Net income / average equity, annualized.
metrics.derivation: bank_audit: net_income (P&L XXV.→XIX.) / equity (BS liab XVI.); annualize YTD ×(4/quarter). Sector version: financial_ratios Table 15 (annualized YTD×12/m).
metrics.caveats: Audit P&L is YTD → must annualize. Consolidated vs unconsolidated differ; the deck is consolidated.

metrics.definition: Net income / average total assets, annualized.
metrics.derivation: net_income / total_assets (BS roman sum), annualized ×(4/quarter).

metrics.definition: Net interest income / average interest-earning assets, annualized.
metrics.derivation: NII (P&L III.) annualized / avg interest-earning assets. Sector NIM also in financial_ratios Table 15.
metrics.caveats: Approximate: 'interest-earning assets' base requires choosing BS lines; banks use slightly different bases.

metrics.definition: NIM after reclassifying FX-swap funding cost from trading into net interest income (a management presentation).
metrics.caveats: Swap cost is embedded in trading/other in the BRSA P&L; isolating it is a bank-specific adjustment not separable from the statements. Deck reports 3.3% (1Q26).

metrics.definition: Operating expenses / total operating revenue.
metrics.derivation: OPEX (P&L XI.+XII.) / gross operating revenue. /cross-bank already computes Cost/Income.
metrics.caveats: Revenue base definition varies slightly (incl./excl. trading) across banks.

metrics.name_tr: Net Ücret ve Komisyonlar / Operasyonel Giderler
metrics.definition: Net fee & commission income / operating expenses (fee-led cost coverage).
metrics.derivation: net fees (P&L) / OPEX (P&L). Sector analogue ratioFeesToOpex in metrics.ts.

metrics.definition: Interest income minus interest expense.
metrics.derivation: bank_audit_profit_loss hierarchy III. (net interest income).

metrics.definition: Fee & commission income minus fee & commission expense.
metrics.derivation: bank_audit_profit_loss fee/commission lines (net).

metrics.definition: Net gains/losses on trading, FX and derivatives.
metrics.derivation: bank_audit_profit_loss trading/FX lines.
metrics.caveats: Includes swap cost — which is why deck reports a separate swap-adjusted view.

metrics.definition: Interest income attributable to CPI-indexed (TÜFE) government securities.
metrics.caveats: A sub-component of interest income the bank carves out in IR; not a separate line in the standard BRSA P&L. Depends on each bank's CPI valuation assumption (Akbank uses 25% for 1Q26).

metrics.definition: Sum of all asset lines.
metrics.derivation: bank_audit_balance_sheet roman I.–X. sum (fallback AKTİF TOPLAMI).

metrics.definition: Gross cash loans before expected-credit-loss deduction.
metrics.derivation: bank_audit_balance_sheet hierarchy 2.1; TL/FX via amount_tl/amount_fc.

metrics.definition: Total customer deposits.
metrics.derivation: bank_audit_balance_sheet liabilities hierarchy I.; TL/FX split via amount_tl/amount_fc.

metrics.definition: Demand (non-interest-bearing) deposits / total deposits.
metrics.caveats: The demand/time split is NOT in the main BRSA per-bank balance sheet (it's a footnote). We hold demand vs time only at SECTOR level (monthly deposits table), not per bank. Deck: 33% (1Q26).

metrics.definition: Total securities (TL/FX; fixed/floating/CPI-linker breakdown where disclosed).
metrics.derivation: Total securities = direct from BS. But the fixed/floating/CPI-linker composition (deck p8) lives in footnotes we don't currently extract → partial.

metrics.definition: Total shareholders' equity.
metrics.derivation: bank_audit_balance_sheet liabilities hierarchy XVI. (TOPLAM ÖZKAYNAKLAR).

metrics.definition: Period-over-period change in loans (YtD or YoY), TL and FX separately.
metrics.derivation: Δ of loans_gross across audit periods. NOTE the deck cites WEEKLY BDDK solo data for growth/market share; we hold per-bank loans only quarterly (audit) — sector loans are weekly.
metrics.caveats: FX loan growth in USD requires deflating the TL FX-loan series by USD/TRY.

metrics.definition: Gross non-performing (Stage 3) loans / gross loans.
metrics.derivation: npl_gross (credit_quality npl_brsa_gross) / gross_loans. Sector version financial_ratios Table 15.

metrics.definition: Loan gross carrying amounts split by IFRS 9 stage.
metrics.derivation: bank_audit_stages / bank_audit_credit_quality (loans_by_stage).

metrics.definition: (Stage 2 + Stage 3 loans) / gross loans.
metrics.derivation: (stage2_amount + stage3_amount) / gross_loans from bank_audit_stages.

metrics.definition: Provisions / loans, on a base the bank chooses (Stage-3 coverage, or total provisions over Stage 2+3).
metrics.derivation: Components present: stage ECL, total ECL allowance (BS 2.5), npl_brsa_provision. We compute Stage-3 coverage = provision/npl_gross = 65.4%. The deck's 27.6% uses a different base (total provisions over Stage 2+3) — derivable but you must match the bank's exact definition.
metrics.caveats: NOT standardized: 'coverage' means different ratios at different banks. Pin the numerator/denominator per bank.

metrics.definition: Net loan-loss provisioning expense / average loans, annualized.
metrics.derivation: Net ECL expense (credit_quality loans_ecl_expense) and NPL flows (bank_audit_npl_movement: inflows/collections/write-offs) / avg loans, annualized.
metrics.caveats: Banks differ on gross vs net of recoveries and on currency-impact adjustments → not directly comparable.

metrics.definition: Restructured loans / total loans.
metrics.caveats: Disclosed in footnotes/IR only, definitions vary. Deck: 3.8% (1Q26).

metrics.definition: Total regulatory capital / risk-weighted assets.
metrics.caveats: Standardized (Basel III) and disclosed, but NOT in the financial statements we extract. We hold CAR only at SECTOR/group level (financial_ratios Table 15). Per-bank CAR would need the capital-adequacy footnote (not extracted).

metrics.definition: Common Equity Tier 1 capital / risk-weighted assets.
metrics.caveats: Sector CET1 lives in other_data (BDDK table 12). Per-bank not extracted.

metrics.definition: Total liabilities / equity.
metrics.derivation: BS TOPLAM YABANCI KAYNAKLAR / TOPLAM ÖZKAYNAKLAR (metrics.ts leverage() at sector level).

metrics.definition: Loans / deposits.
metrics.derivation: gross_loans / deposits.

metrics.definition: High-quality liquid assets / 30-day net cash outflows.
metrics.caveats: Regulatory ratio disclosed in footnotes only; not in the statements we extract and not in any sector table we hold.

metrics.definition: External borrowings (syndications, bonds, AT1) maturity profile and FX liquidity buffer.
metrics.caveats: Deal-level IR disclosure (deck p10/p21). Not a standardized statement line.

metrics.definition: Number of customers active on digital channels in a trailing window.
metrics.caveats: THE canonical non-comparable customer metric: each bank defines 'active' and the window differently, and it is not a financial-statement item. We hold TBB digital stats at SECTOR level only, not per bank. Deck: 15.5 mn (1Q26).

metrics.definition: Number of branches (domestic/foreign) and employees.
metrics.derivation: bank_audit_profile (qualitative section). Extracted for 16/31 banks; the rest use phrasings not yet covered by the regex.

metrics.definition: A bank's loans / a peer aggregate's loans (e.g. among private banks).
metrics.caveats: Deck uses Akbank SOLO weekly BDDK data ÷ private-bank group. We hold Akbank solo only QUARTERLY (audit) and peer groups via weekly_series — so a quarterly approximation is possible, but not the deck's weekly cadence or exact peer-set definition. Deck: 12.7% loans (1Q26).

metrics.definition: Assets under management and market positions of subsidiaries (asset mgmt, pension, leasing, brokerage).
metrics.caveats: Subsidiary figures (AK Portföy AuM 1,416 bn; pension 452 bn, 19.3% share; leasing 12.4%) are IR disclosures, not bank financial-statement lines.

metrics.definition: Third-party sustainability scores (MSCI, Sustainalytics, CDP, Refinitiv).
metrics.caveats: Different providers, different scales; published by rating agencies, not the bank. Deck p27.

metrics.name_tr: TCMB Politika Faizi ve Makro Görünüm
metrics.definition: Macro context: policy rate, inflation, FX, reserves, dollarization.
metrics.derivation: TCMB EVDS series (already on /rates and /liquidity). Deck pages 2-3 backdrop.
